---
title: "07c_alternative_integration"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and processed data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)

model_data_expression_only <- read_rds(
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_expression_only.rds")
)

model_data_methylation_only <- read_rds(
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_methylation_only.rds")
)

model_rf_expr <- readRDS(here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_rf_expression.rds"))
model_rf_meth <- readRDS(here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_rf_methylation.rds"))

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Restrict to common cases
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_df <- model_data_expression_only %>%
  select(case_submitter_id, survival_500, starts_with("ENSG"))


meth_df <- model_data_methylation_only %>%
  select(case_submitter_id, survival_500, starts_with("cg"))

common_cases <- intersect(expr_df$case_submitter_id, meth_df$case_submitter_id)

expr_df <- expr_df %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  arrange(case_submitter_id)

expr_feature_cols <- names(expr_df)[str_detect(names(expr_df), "^ENSG")]

expr_df <- expr_df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(expr_feature_cols), ~ log1p(.x)))

summary(as.matrix(expr_df %>% select(starts_with("ENSG")))[, 1:5])

meth_df <- meth_df %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  arrange(case_submitter_id)

stopifnot(all(expr_df$case_submitter_id == meth_df$case_submitter_id))
stopifnot(all(expr_df$survival_500 == meth_df$survival_500))

# Keep levels as c("No", "Yes") here because glm(binomial) models the probability of the second factor level, i.e. "Yes".
y_common <- factor(expr_df$survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))

x_expr <- expr_df %>%
  select(-case_submitter_id, -survival_500)

x_meth <- meth_df %>%
  select(-case_submitter_id, -survival_500)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Shared resampling folds
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

fold_index <- createMultiFolds(y_common, k = 5, times = 5)

fold_results <- vector("list", length(fold_index))
fold_names <- names(fold_index)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Loop over folds
#--------------------------------------------------

for (i in seq_along(fold_index)) {
  
  train_idx <- fold_index[[i]]
  test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(x_expr)), train_idx)
  
  x_expr_train <- x_expr[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  x_expr_test  <- x_expr[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  
  x_meth_train <- x_meth[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  x_meth_test  <- x_meth[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  
  y_train <- y_common[train_idx]
  y_test  <- y_common[test_idx]
  
expr_best <- model_rf_expr$bestTune
meth_best <- model_rf_meth$bestTune
  
  # expression RF
  rf_expr <- ranger(
    x = x_expr_train,
    y = y_train,
    probability = TRUE,
    num.trees = 1000,
    mtry = expr_best$mtry,
    min.node.size = expr_best$min.node.size,
    importance = "impurity",
    seed = 123
  )
  
  pred_expr <- predict(rf_expr, data = x_expr_test)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  pred_expr_train <- predict(rf_expr, data = x_expr_train)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  
  # methylation RF
  rf_meth <- ranger(
    x = x_meth_train,
    y = y_train,
    probability = TRUE,
    num.trees = 1000,
    mtry = meth_best$mtry,
    min.node.size = meth_best$min.node.size,
    importance = "impurity",
    seed = 123
  )
  
  pred_meth <- predict(rf_meth, data = x_meth_test)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  pred_meth_train <- predict(rf_meth, data = x_meth_train)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  
  # late integration: average
  pred_avg <- (pred_expr + pred_meth) / 2
  
  # late integration: stacked meta-learner
  stack_train <- tibble(
    expr_prob = pred_expr_train,
    meth_prob = pred_meth_train,
    survival_500 = y_train
  )
  
  stack_test <- tibble(
    expr_prob = pred_expr,
    meth_prob = pred_meth
  )
  
  meta_fit <- glm(
    survival_500 ~ expr_prob + meth_prob,
    data = stack_train,
    family = binomial()
  )
  
  pred_stack <- predict(meta_fit, newdata = stack_test, type = "response")
  
  fold_results[[i]] <- tibble(
    case_submitter_id = expr_df$case_submitter_id[test_idx],
    obs = y_test,
    expr_prob = pred_expr,
    meth_prob = pred_meth,
    late_avg_prob = pred_avg,
    late_stack_prob = pred_stack,
    Resample = fold_names[i]
  )
}

oof_predictions <- bind_rows(fold_results)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Evaluate AUCs
#--------------------------------------------------

late_integration_summary <- tibble(
  model = c("Expression_RF", "Methylation_RF", "LateIntegration_Average", "LateIntegration_Stacked"),
  auc = c(
    as.numeric(roc(oof_predictions$obs, oof_predictions$expr_prob, levels = c("No", "Yes"), direction = "<")$auc),
    as.numeric(roc(oof_predictions$obs, oof_predictions$meth_prob, levels = c("No", "Yes"), direction = "<")$auc),
    as.numeric(roc(oof_predictions$obs, oof_predictions$late_avg_prob, levels = c("No", "Yes"), direction = "<")$auc),
    as.numeric(roc(oof_predictions$obs, oof_predictions$late_stack_prob, levels = c("No", "Yes"), direction = "<")$auc)
  )
)

print(late_integration_summary)

final_model_comparison <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

direct_multiomic_rf <- final_model_comparison %>%
  filter(data_source == "Multiomic", model %in% c("RandomForest", "Random Forest")) %>%
  transmute(
    model = "DirectIntegration_Multiomic_RF",
    auc = auc
  )

late_integration_summary <- bind_rows(
  late_integration_summary,
  direct_multiomic_rf
)

write_csv(
  oof_predictions,
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_oof_predictions.csv")
)

write_csv(
  late_integration_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
p_late_integration <- late_integration_summary %>%
  mutate(model = fct_reorder(model, auc)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = auc, y = model)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F59E0B", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", auc)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    colour = "black",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(late_integration_summary$auc, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.12)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Alternative integration check",
    x = "Out-of-fold AUC",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

p_late_integration

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "late_integration_auc.png"),
  plot = p_late_integration,
  width = 8,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
